entries.name: Aasimar
entries.desc: A creature infused with the light of the Upper Planes.

entries.name: Dragonborn
entries.desc: Draconic humanoids with breath weapons and elemental resistance.

entries.name: Dwarf
entries.desc: Stout humanoids known for endurance and craft.

entries.name: Elf
entries.desc: Agile, long-lived humanoids with deep ties to the Feywild.

entries.name: Gnome
entries.desc: Small, inventive humanoids with a knack for tinkering and magic.

entries.name: Goliath
entries.desc: Giant-kin shaped by the harsh environment of mountain peaks.

entries.name: Halfling
entries.desc: Small humanoids who value home, food, and comfort.

entries.name: Human
entries.desc: Versatile and ambitious; adapt to any calling.

entries.name: Orc
entries.desc: Resilient humanoids with physical power and deep tribal bonds.

entries.name: Tiefling
entries.desc: Humanoids with an infernal heritage, marked by horns and tails.

entries.name: Half-Elf
entries.desc: A blend of human versatility and elven grace.

entries.name: Half-Orc
entries.desc: Hardened warriors born of orc and human ancestry.
